--- title: "Start Here" --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal).. ## Quick start This vignette gives a minimal, fully working workflow for an **unconditional** model and a **conditional** model. Everything uses short MCMC runs so the vignette renders quickly. --- ## Unconditional Model (CRP, bulk-only) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} data("nc_pos200_k3", package = "CausalMixGPD") y <- nc_pos200_k3$y ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} bundle_uncond <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y, backend = "crp", kernel = "gamma", GPD = FALSE, components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_uncond <- load_or_fit("quickstart-start-here-fit_uncond", quiet_mcmc(run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_uncond, show_progress = FALSE))) summary(fit_uncond) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Gamma Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 200 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 1 WAIC: 963.248 lppd: -456.908 | pWAIC: 24.716 Summary table
parameter mean sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975 ess
weights[1] 0.883 0.138 0.474 0.917 1 8.469
alpha 0.457 0.398 0.022 0.354 1.503 42.38
shape[1] 1.161 0.151 0.915 1.159 1.483 14.106
scale[1] 0.265 0.037 0.204 0.266 0.338 25.996
``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_q <- predict(fit_uncond, type = "quantile", p = c(0.5, 0.9), interval = "credible") head(pred_q$fit) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` estimate index lower upper 1 0.228 0.5 0.135 0.342 2 0.687 0.9 0.467 0.915 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(pred_q) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](start-here_files/figure-html/start-uncond-predict-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: --- ## Conditional Model (SB, bulk-only) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} data("nc_posX100_p3_k2", package = "CausalMixGPD") yc <- nc_posX100_p3_k2$y X <- as.matrix(nc_posX100_p3_k2$X) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} bundle_cond <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = yc, X = X, backend = "sb", kernel = "lognormal", GPD = FALSE, components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_cond <- load_or_fit("quickstart-start-here-fit_cond", quiet_mcmc(run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_cond, show_progress = FALSE))) summary(fit_cond) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Lognormal Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 100 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 3 WAIC: 509.609 lppd: -220.586 | pWAIC: 34.218 Summary table

weights[3] 0.159 0.054 0.06 0.16 0.263 19.977

``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} x_new <- X[1:20, , drop = FALSE] pred_mean <- predict(fit_cond, x = x_new, type = "mean", interval = "credible", nsim_mean = 200) head(pred_mean$fit) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` id estimate lower upper 1 1 23.6 1.038 79.6 2 2 860.6 1.212 292.6 3 3 418.0 1.012 905.9 4 4 51.0 0.972 313.9 5 5 22.6 1.000 160.9 6 6 173.7 1.105 1067.2 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(pred_mean) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](start-here_files/figure-html/start-cond-predict-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: --- ## Useful S3 Methods ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} params(fit_uncond) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "0.457" $w [1] "0.883" $shape [1] "1.161" $scale [1] "0.265" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_uncond, family = c("traceplot", "running")) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Scale for colour is already present. Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale. Scale for colour is already present. Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale. ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](start-here_files/figure-html/start-s3-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](start-here_files/figure-html/start-s3-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: --- ## Next Steps - `QuickStart/introduction`: package overview and terminology - `Examples/ex05`: full three-phase workflow (spec -> bundle -> MCMC) - `Examples/ex06-ex13`: unconditional/conditional models with and without GPD - `Examples/ex14-ex19`: causal workflows --- ## Workflow Navigation - Previous: none (start of workflow series) - Next: [introduction](introduction.html) - Workflow index: [Roadmap](../roadmap.html) - Practical entry: [Examples](../Examples/index.html)
